original_image_tags: Two black-and-white photographs of disc-shaped objects in the sky over a treeline. The left photo shows a dark, clear disc. The right photo shows a similar disc, partially obscured by tree branches.

elements.description: A black-and-white photograph positioned in the lower-left section of the flyer. It depicts a dark, disc-shaped object (a flying saucer) hovering in the sky above a dark landscape featuring trees or foliage.

A black-and-white photograph positioned in the lower-right section of the flyer. It depicts a dark, disc-shaped object (a flying saucer) hovering in the sky above a dark landscape featuring trees or foliage.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on two black-and-white photographs showing disc-shaped objects in the sky over a treeline, with no contradictory details about the visual content.
